g.text: Obtaining a Signed Payload as a Provider - Email
It is assumed that provider payloads are signed and have nonce handling
Requires a signed payload for an action
fetch UserKeyData by UserIdentifier and providerMsaId
sessionId associated with request (202 w/Location header)
Persist payload w/associated authentication code and sessionId,
Clicks link w/authentication code and sessionId
Fetch payload by authentication code and sessionId
Persist by authorization code and sessionId
Redirect to callback url with authorization code and sessionId
trade authorization code and sessionId for signed payload
Fetch by authorization code and sessionId
fetch UserKeyData by UserIdentifier and providerMsaId
Decrypt call to get the private key decrypted
mutate resource with signed provider payload
